msg: warning: Variable flags is a dead store!
reasoning: Same file (c76df14dfb4.c) and same dead store bug as FAMILY_67, now reporting line 42 ('flags |= T_ESCAPE_SHELL_CMD;') in the #else branch (executed when NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES is NOT defined). Same reasoning: flags is assigned here but never read outside the loop — reset to 0 on each next iteration or abandoned at loop exit. The presence condition captures the complement of FAMILY_67: configs where NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES is not active. The condition is correctly constrained for the #else branch. Known bug (same vbdb entry c76df14dfb4).
